welcome.title: Run Your Hotel Like a 5-Star Operation — Automatically
welcome.subtitle: Manage bookings, housekeeping, finance and smart rooms — all from one dashboard.
welcome.description: Enjoy smart automation, smart room controls, and instant service requests. Automate your stay with AI-assisted communication and secure, role-based access.
welcome.newHotel: New hotel? Register above to start managing your guests with O.S.S

landing.heroTitle1: Run Your Hotel Like a 5-Star Operation
landing.pwaSubtitle: No app store needed. Install directly from your browser — works on all platforms, offline-ready.
landing.pwaWorksOffline: Works offline · No app store required · Always up to date
landing.heroExtended: Manage properties, automate operations, and delight guests with smart room technology.
landing.trialText: 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
landing.allPlansTrialText: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.
landing.readyToTransformDesc: Join hospitality professionals who trust O.S.S for smarter operations.
landing.demoSubtitle: Experience the full platform instantly. No signup required — pick a role and explore.

landing.demoRoleAdminDesc: Manage bookings, service requests, staff operations, and daily tasks.
landing.demoRoleReceptionDesc: Check-in guests, handle requests, manage rooms, and communicate with guests.
landing.demoRoleGuestDesc: Smart room controls, service requests, chat with staff, and booking details.
landing.everythingYouNeed: Everything You Need to Run Your Property
landing.everythingYouNeedDesc: From bookings to billing, staff management to smart devices. O.S.S covers every aspect of modern hospitality management.
landing.simpleTransparentPricingDesc: Choose the plan that fits your operation. Upgrade anytime as you grow.

highlights.multiPropertyDesc: Manage hotels, resorts, villas, and more from one dashboard
highlights.smartRoomsDesc: IoT-powered room controls for lights, temperature, and doors
highlights.realTimeAnalyticsDesc: Revenue, occupancy, and performance insights at a glance
highlights.teamManagementDesc: Role-based access for owners, managers, reception, and staff
highlights.iotIntegrationDesc: Connect and monitor smart devices across all properties
highlights.automationDesc: Recurring expenses, payroll, and booking workflows on autopilot

featureDetails.secureAccessDesc: Role-based permissions for every team member
featureDetails.smartControlsDesc: IoT-powered lights, temperature, and door management
featureDetails.guestCommunicationDesc: Real-time chat between guests and staff
featureDetails.bookingManagementDesc: Full booking lifecycle from reservation to checkout
featureDetails.financialAnalyticsDesc: Revenue, expenses, payroll, and profit tracking
featureDetails.serviceRequestsDesc: Guest requests handled and tracked seamlessly
featureDetails.restaurantKdsDesc: Guests order food from their room via phone. Color-coded real-time KDS keeps the kitchen on track. Waiters manage delivery through their own dashboard, and charges post directly to the guest's room folio.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Start managing your hotel in minutes.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up and create your hotel in less than 2 minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Add rooms, invite staff members and configure your property.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Manage reservations, guests and payments from one dashboard.

trustedBy.title: Trusted by modern hotels
trustedBy.subtitle: Hotels, guesthouses and resorts use OSS to manage their operations.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How long does it take to set up OSS?
faq.a1: Most hotels can set up their property and start managing bookings in less than 10 minutes.
faq.q2: Do I need a credit card to start the free trial?
faq.a2: No. You can start the 14-day free trial without entering a credit card.
faq.a3: Yes. OSS supports multi-property management in the Growth and Pro plans.
faq.q4: Is OSS suitable for small hotels and guesthouses?
faq.a4: Yes. OSS is designed for both small boutique hotels and large hotel groups.
faq.a5: Yes. There are no long-term contracts and you can cancel your subscription anytime.

productPreview.title: See O.S.S in Action
productPreview.subtitle: A complete hospitality platform designed for modern hotel operations

dashboard.title: All Operations in One Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Monitor occupancy, revenue, bookings, and staff performance from a single unified dashboard. Real-time data at your fingertips.

smartRoom.title: Smart Room Control Interface
smartRoom.desc: Control lighting, temperature, curtains, and smart locks for every room. IoT-powered automation that delights your guests.

communication.title: Guest Communication System
communication.desc: Handle service requests, complaints, and internal messaging. Escalation workflows ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

analytics.title: Analytics and Reports
analytics.desc: Track RevPAR, ADR, occupancy trends, and financial performance. Export reports and make data-driven decisions.

whyOss.title: Why Choose O.S.S?
whyOss.subtitle: Built for modern hospitality, not retrofitted from legacy systems
whyOss.allInOneDesc: Property management, bookings, finance, staff, and guest services — unified in a single platform. No more juggling multiple tools.
whyOss.smartRoomDesc: Native IoT support for lighting, temperature, curtains, and smart locks. Control every room from your dashboard.
whyOss.analyticsDesc: Live occupancy tracking, dynamic pricing, automated housekeeping, and financial reporting — all running in real time.
whyOss.multiPropertyDesc: Manage multiple hotels, resorts, or guesthouses from one account. Unified reporting across all your properties.

cta.headline: Start Running Your Hotel Smarter Today
cta.subtext: Join hundreds of properties already using O.S.S to streamline their operations.

instantValue.title: Everything You Need to Run Your Property
instantValue.subtitle: One platform to replace dozens of disconnected tools
instantValue.bullet1: Manage bookings and guests in one dashboard
instantValue.bullet3: Control smart rooms and IoT devices remotely
instantValue.bullet4: Track revenue and performance analytics in real time
instantValue.bullet5: Manage staff tasks and service requests effortlessly

housekeeping.title: Housekeeping
housekeeping.desc: Live cleaning task board with room status updates, priority engine, and inspection flow. See how staff mark rooms clean in real-time.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.desc: Track repair requests and technical service tasks, assign technicians, set priority levels, and follow progress from open to resolved.

restaurantManager.title: Restaurant Manager
restaurantManager.desc: Manages waiters, kitchen, orders, finances, cleaning crew and all restaurant staff. Includes performance tracking.

kitchen.title: Kitchen (KDS)
kitchen.desc: Real-time Kitchen Display — orders with table numbers, messaging waiters and managers, assigning tasks to the cleaning crew.

waiter.title: Waiter
waiter.desc: Guest messaging, DELIVERED button when order is delivered, sending tasks to the kitchen and manager.

restaurantCleaner.title: Restaurant Cleaner
restaurantCleaner.desc: Receives tasks from manager, waiter, and kitchen. Sends a photo with the READY button when done.

restaurantCashier.title: Restaurant Cashier
restaurantCashier.desc: Tracks all open table bills, prints receipts, accepts payment by cash/card/room charge, and integrates with hotel finance.

demo.moreRolesIncluded: More roles included in your subscription:

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Notifications
whatsapp.subtitle: Communicate with your guests directly via WhatsApp — booking confirmation, arrival reminders, service messages and more.
whatsapp.f1Desc: An automatic WhatsApp message is sent to the guest when a new reservation is made.
whatsapp.f2Desc: An automatic reminder is sent to the guest one day before their check-in date.
whatsapp.f3Desc: Notifications like room readiness and order status are delivered instantly.
whatsapp.f4Desc: Checkout procedure and rating request are sent automatically.
whatsapp.f5Desc: You can send personalized WhatsApp messages to any guest.
whatsapp.f6Desc: The delivery status of every sent message is recorded in the system.
whatsapp.footerNote: This service is available as an optional add-on — can be activated for any plan.

privacy.introText: O.S.S Smart Hotel System ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting the privacy and security of your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and share your data when you use our cloud-based hotel management platform.
privacy.dataCollectionText: We collect the following types of information to provide and improve our services:
privacy.dataItem1: Account information: name, email address, phone number, and business details during registration
privacy.dataItem2: Property data: hotel/property details, room configurations, staff information, and booking records
privacy.dataItem3: Guest information: names, contact details, check-in/check-out dates, and service preferences
privacy.dataItem4: Payment information: billing details processed securely through Stripe and Epoint payment providers
privacy.dataItem5: Usage data: login activity, feature usage, device information, and IP addresses for security purposes
privacy.dataUseText: We use your information for the following purposes:
privacy.useItem1: Providing and maintaining the hotel management platform services
privacy.useItem3: Sending transactional notifications (booking confirmations, service updates, staff alerts)
privacy.useItem4: Improving our platform through aggregated, anonymized analytics
privacy.useItem5: Ensuring platform security and preventing unauthorized access
privacy.dataSharingText: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with:
privacy.shareItem1: Payment processors (Stripe, Epoint) to complete transactions securely
privacy.shareItem2: Email service providers (Resend) to deliver transactional notifications
privacy.shareItem3: Law enforcement when required by applicable law or legal process
privacy.dataSecurityText: We implement industry-standard security measures including encrypted data transmission (TLS/SSL), secure password hashing (bcrypt), JWT-based authentication, role-based access controls, and multi-tenant data isolation. Each property owner's data is logically separated to prevent cross-tenant access.
privacy.cookiesText: We use essential cookies and session tokens to maintain your authentication state and preferences. We do not use third-party tracking cookies for advertising purposes.
privacy.retentionText: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. Upon account deletion request, we will remove your personal data within 30 days, except where retention is required by law or for legitimate business purposes such as dispute resolution.
privacy.rightsText: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.rightItem1: Access: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
privacy.rightItem2: Correction: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
privacy.rightItem3: Deletion: Request deletion of your personal data
privacy.rightItem4: Portability: Request your data in a portable, machine-readable format
privacy.rightItem5: Objection: Object to processing of your data for specific purposes
privacy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify registered users of material changes via email. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your data rights, please contact us at:

terms.acceptanceText: By accessing or using the O.S.S Smart Hotel System platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you may not use our services. These terms apply to all users including property owners, staff members, and guests.
terms.serviceDescText: O.S.S Smart Hotel System is a cloud-based, multi-tenant property management platform that provides:
terms.serviceItem1: Property and unit management with multi-property support
terms.serviceItem2: Booking management and guest check-in/check-out processing
terms.serviceItem3: Smart room controls (lighting, climate, access) via IoT integration
terms.serviceItem4: Staff management, task assignment, and internal communication
terms.serviceItem5: Financial management including revenue tracking and expense reporting
terms.serviceItem6: Guest service request handling and real-time notifications
terms.accountText: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use. Property owners are responsible for ensuring their staff and guests comply with these terms.
terms.subscriptionText: Our services are offered through subscription plans with varying feature sets and usage limits. Plans are billed monthly. Features and pricing are subject to change with 30 days notice to active subscribers. Free trial periods, if offered, are subject to separate terms.
terms.paymentText: Payments are processed securely through Stripe (for USD/EUR) and Epoint (for AZN). Subscriptions auto-renew unless cancelled before the end of the billing period. Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis. Failure to pay may result in service suspension.
terms.dataOwnershipText: You retain ownership of all data you enter into the platform, including property information, booking records, guest data, and financial records. We do not claim ownership of your content. We are granted a limited license to use this data solely to provide the services. Upon account termination, you may request data export.
terms.acceptableUseText: You agree not to use the platform to:
terms.useItem1: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
terms.useItem2: Attempt to access data belonging to other tenants or users
terms.useItem3: Interfere with or disrupt the platform infrastructure or security
terms.useItem4: Upload malicious code, spam, or harmful content
terms.slaText: We strive to maintain 99.9% platform uptime. Scheduled maintenance windows will be communicated in advance. We are not liable for downtime caused by circumstances beyond our reasonable control, including force majeure events, third-party service outages, or internet connectivity issues.
terms.limitationText: To the maximum extent permitted by law, O.S.S shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the platform. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you in the 12 months preceding the claim.
terms.terminationText: Either party may terminate the service agreement at any time. Upon termination, your access will be revoked at the end of the current billing period. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms without prior notice. Data export will be available for 30 days after termination.
terms.governingLawText: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Azerbaijan. Any disputes shall be resolved through the courts of Baku, Azerbaijan, unless an alternative dispute resolution mechanism is agreed upon by both parties.
terms.changesText: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email to registered users at least 30 days before taking effect. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance.
terms.contactText: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at:

onboarding.title: Property Setup Wizard
onboarding.subtitle: Let's set up your property in a few easy steps

finance.title: Financial Settings
finance.description: Based on this information, the system will automatically calculate your monthly expenses, taxes, and payroll.
finance.taxRateHint: VAT, sales tax, etc. — this percentage of revenue will be calculated as tax
finance.utilityPctHint: Electricity, water, gas, internet — this percentage of monthly revenue will be counted as utility expense
finance.cleaningMonthlyHint: Fixed monthly cleaning cost (chemicals, supplies, external company)
finance.employeeTaxRateHint: Social insurance, income tax — tax rate added on top of salary
finance.additionalExpensesHint: Specify other fixed monthly costs not included above (e.g. OTA commissions, subscriptions, insurance).
finance.additionalExpensesExample: Example: Booking.com 15% commission = approx. $1,500/month on $10,000 revenue
finance.skipNote: If you leave these fields empty, the system will not automatically calculate expenses. You can change this later in settings.

terms.pageDescription: OSS Service Agreement — Orange Studio MMC, Baku Azerbaijan. Cloud-based smart hotel automation system terms and conditions.
terms.copyright: Orange Studio MMC. All rights reserved.
terms.s1_intro: OSS is a cloud-based smart hotel automation system providing:
terms.s1_cloud: Service is provided via cloud servers and requires internet access.
terms.s2_intro: Client subscribes to a selected OSS plan:
terms.s2_pricing: Selected plans and pricing are defined inside the OSS platform.
terms.s3_p2: After the trial period ends, paid subscription is required.
terms.s3_p3: OSS may automatically restrict features after trial expiration.
terms.s4_p1: Subscription fees must be paid according to the billing cycle.
terms.s4_p3: Prices are shown inside the OSS platform.
terms.s5_p1: If payment is overdue for more than 10 calendar days, OSS services may be automatically suspended.
terms.s5_p2: Service will be restored after payment.
terms.s5_p3: Orange Studio MMC is not responsible for losses caused by suspension due to unpaid invoices.
terms.s6_note: Orange Studio MMC is not responsible for hardware failures or installation errors.
terms.s7_p1: Orange Studio MMC will make reasonable efforts to keep the service online.
terms.s7_p2: Temporary downtime may occur due to:
terms.s8_intro: Orange Studio MMC shall not be liable for:
terms.s8_limit: Total liability is limited to the amount paid by the client for the last 30 days.
terms.s9_p3: Client agrees to automatic system operation.
terms.s10_p3: This constitutes a legally binding agreement.
terms.s12_p1: The Client subscribes to a selected OSS plan.
terms.s12_p2: The selected plan is recorded electronically at the time of agreement.
terms.s12_p4: These details are stored in the OSS system as part of the legally binding agreement.
terms.s13_p1: This agreement is written in English.
terms.s13_p2: Translations into other languages are provided for convenience only.
terms.s13_p3: In case of any differences, the English version shall prevail.
terms.dataResponsibilityText: Client is responsible for the accuracy and legality of all data entered into OSS. Orange Studio MMC is not responsible for incorrect or illegal data entered by the Client.
terms.accountTerminationText: Orange Studio MMC reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts in case of:
terms.accountTerminationNotice: Service may be terminated without prior notice.

dynamicPricing.title: Dynamic Pricing
